summary: Compose a daily heartbeat digest from a list of pages and post it to a configured channel.
body:
# heartbeat-digest

Select the top N most-recently-updated wiki pages (default 5) and render a markdown digest. The digest must lead with the highest-priority item.

## Inputs
- `wiki_paths` (string[]) — paths to read, in priority order.
- `max_items` (integer, default 5) — cap on digest length.

## Output
- `digest_md` (string) — fully rendered markdown.
